home.tagline: The science of eating well, living longer.
home.description: {count} ingredients studied for their effect on healthy aging. Grounded in peer-reviewed research from multiple sources.
home.cta_ingredients_description: Browse all ingredients by category, sort A–Z or by longevity score.
home.cta_recipes_description: Mediterranean and longevity cuisine grounded in peer-reviewed research.

ingredients.no_results: No ingredients found. Try a different filter or search term.
ingredients.page_description: Ingredients studied for their effect on healthy aging. Filter by category or sort A–Z.

recipes.no_results: No recipes found. Try a different search term.
recipes.page_description: Mediterranean and longevity cuisine. Every recipe is built around ingredients with proven health benefits.

sources.title: Sources
sources.description: Every claim in this wiki is grounded in peer-reviewed research. These are the books and publications we have parsed, verified, and structured into the ingredient database.
sources.coming_soon_description: We are actively parsing additional longevity research including works by Valter Longo, Peter Attia, and Dan Buettner.

support.title: Support the Wiki
support.pledge_body: Longevity Wiki will never run advertising. No sponsored content. No affiliate links disguised as recommendations. No paywalls. No data collection.
support.pledge_sub: Every ingredient article and recipe is written based on peer-reviewed science, not whoever pays the most. This is how nutrition information should work.
support.books_description: Each longevity research book we parse becomes 50-100 new ingredient articles and dozens of science-backed recipes.
support.hosting_description: Domain registration, hosting, and the occasional coffee for the person maintaining this.
support.research_description: Cross-referencing claims with PubMed studies, verifying mechanisms, updating articles when new research comes out.
support.bmc_description: One-time or monthly. Credit card, Apple Pay, Google Pay. No account needed.
support.crypto_description: Send ETH or any EVM-compatible token to this address.
support.crypto_networks: Ethereum, Polygon, Arbitrum, Optimism, Base, or any EVM chain.
support.contribute_description: This is an open source project. You can help by improving the ingredient extraction skills, adding new data, fixing bugs, or writing better wiki articles. Every pull request makes the wiki better for everyone.
support.wiki_repo_description: The website, articles, and recipes. Add ingredients, fix content, improve the design.
support.skills_repo_description: The Claude Code skills that extract, research, and generate content. Improve the pipeline, add new book parsers.

footer.description: Open source food encyclopedia grounded in peer-reviewed longevity research.
